textByHashes.854ee7ea10ddee995cff9dc945ad7f6fba7853a5: I will return only once I have repaired the tribal statue. Bones!!
textByHashes.be389f792273c404545fbb3202856660410f0b24: I'm ... er ... collecting materials to repair the statue with.
textByHashes.0944365026e2de85d85c3736a0cdf893dd99ca23: Hmm ... I think I need banana in Karamjan rum.
textByHashes.a77a5dc5162e2c7929331e1bb9ae11bba0f4be19: You first help me, then I'll help you.
textByHashes.06e051a639c89f6f27a7a14394c34bb18a8b90a5: Have you found my banana in Karamjan rum yet?
textByHashes.aa544014e20ada896fbf2420cd5902bc610c88d0: I can't use this - there is a banana blocking the bottle!
textByHashes.6658fd0d4ca685687531a2189799a7c0b40d85ca: Find some way of actually getting the banana inside the bottle.
textByHashes.a74b1e40a89965b79bdece58263f0a4d08a71f2a: Yes ... that's it! Hits just the spot!
textByHashes.4a7a89ea528b7ffaed4746b15054e846681f211e: Not yet. I need one more thing...
textByHashes.fcaf1814591640880a5ad3aa59dbf269a308e8ed: Seaweed ... Yes - a seaweed sandwich will do the trick.
textByHashes.f0394784f4aabd49651812388b9ce00a65538958: Aha! A seaweed in monkey skin sandwich!
textByHashes.33cba57c0bbd3a05f707ec7f539c04e64687323f: It's available in any respectable drinking establishment.
textByHashes.e46e9391ab77e11c12877f7a98ab382366814326: Oblige me by fetching my drink.
textByHashes.3adfd2cd171710ea4b9d0a243281fe684688b274: On a scale of 1 to barmy , I'm about .
textByHashes.37b0261213a6c11bf8a80a79989e0f5af4ddfa7b: On a scale of 1 to kooky , I'm about .
textByHashes.99b8e182b29cd40ca50b6df56823b27fd4b472e0: On a scale of 1 to mad , I'm about .
textByHashes.bf6af4ed544e1616144c4cb858f4f17302a84145: On a scale of 1 to loopy , I'm about .
textByHashes.6e8859764f11a3d259b1c9123e9bea841325621e: Ahem. Sorry. We don't usually talk about it.
textByHashes.1789f0268e02298dea49ebb90ee94dce73081f3e: Have you found my seaweed in monkey skin sandwich yet?
textByHashes.54db2ec1963e6350e989f22d1b1b19a998ba0a50: Yes ... perfect! You really do not understand how necessary that was.
textByHashes.471384bf464c03d75421f858293039544fb43b2a: I need one more thing... I need ... Jogre bones ...
textByHashes.a48fc0b349b67c54fe92329122f38aab0779b251: Indeed. Burnt Jogre bones marinated in... Marinated in...
textByHashes.d606a8eed98b2b369b996ab8e58c32cdba30f1d9: Mmm ... Yes ... That will be good ...
textByHashes.6fedb434aba0119923c1830616cc941d2fbda334: No! Burnt Jogre bones marinated in Karambwanji are in fact essential in the trade of tribal statue repair!
textByHashes.51ca0ddb7d2fae59bd779b05e492a84d5a46c5ea: I can't use this - there is far too much monkey flesh in it.
textByHashes.67c51b1a0f28158af34efe921baf99ca5b418190: Try to find some way of removing the monkey flesh.
textByHashes.dac5311b4f5e2e2857089b2e8e8850533e5a0248: Have you found my burnt Jogre bones marinated in Karambwanji yet?
textByHashes.aeb766bb57f125a5971880d90408f728b8276dd1: I think this needs a bit of Karambwanji. They also don't seem quite burnt enough.}}
textByHashes.9883c1598f0030fe0a90c2fda9f570cf04b59fe8: That was awful! The Jogre bones were not nearly burnt enough.
textByHashes.2d21fe921a24f57c4966308134d52e01b9b2764b: And the Jogre bones were hardly even marinated!
textByHashes.0e1fc30bae0d552cdc37156c7b89242ac4be57e2: You'll have to make it again. Remember to burn the Jogre bones!
textByHashes.ae20ab75b2fc5346d03abc36a18451b461390e6e: I think this needs a bit of Karambwanji.
textByHashes.230cc62fe4a106efec35207e10325369eb20e46d: That was awful! The Jogre bones were hardly even marinated!
textByHashes.1939f4906f7bffd0c80b7a733cf20c9a37d71c75: You'll have to make it again. Remember to marinate the Jogre bones!
textByHashes.b6f82ddee10e5df13f1c9258196ba22a1b2ed2ae: You must either be very skilled or find a way to make them super hot.
textByHashes.4c2553beea6eff72408ecb05abb03524e701d79d: You cook it in a sauce, obviously.
textByHashes.2ae1f2e6d73ec183d2f3098ebd0926626243b39b: They're fish. Do I look like a fisherman?
textByHashes.74c992ef46647d1fae001276a04ebc822038ecd7: Finally! A near lifetime of craving satisfied!
textByHashes.edb74514080e9c2cc26d738dddc6822f4bacf55b: Perfectly able, my friend, thanks to your ministrations!
textByHashes.01ccda0abdfd7c9cfb7a6bd8899e9a2d4a9460c3: Probably best you don't go cooking any more Karambwanji from now on, they can be a bit volatile!
textByHashes.70ed58ebf086ad6f48a03183f6aa833b8e21aa1e: He will not be pleased with me...
textByHashes.8784123b9bce4fb4b8f623fe76633f0712d37a2b: It's complicated - we don't really talk about it.
textByHashes.18f10bca61730472dc68aa97ebb868c200e7124b: Very well. I will meet you in the village once you have helped my brothers and spoken to my father.
textByHashes.dda96b0808c809979cf1aa34e1e51f13fcd2b810: I hope that's what he wanted.
textByHashes.1460de9000c20533d27f89fd5df1139a14c003f6: Braaar! Your meals are truly excellent, Bwana ...
textByHashes.905de60b8f02854f1d5f8404bc55d81fa72a1fe4: ... but there are some areas which could use some ... improvement.
textByHashes.e243bd1e3afa0652a69ab171c2cd99f27d20a018: Oh, and before you go: I finally got around to repairing that statue. You might want to take a look. ... Jogre bones!
textByHashes.50f2e61731b042c18ca4e489b0c267ec41c74de9: Why hello there! What are you doing back here?
textByHashes.327f75e84286d90e242614aae2e71c7b56df5476: Leave me alone! Can't you see I'm a mad priest?
